name: ILNodeControlWait
title: ILNodeControlWait
description: Stops the interaction layer of the specified simulation node. Cyclical sending of messages stops but setting of signals is still possible. The specified node must be in the current bus context. In all other cases the function has no effect and will return with an error.

parameters.name: aNodeName
parameters.description: Name of the node of which the interaction layer should be stopped.
